datadog.name: Datadog

review_excerpts: It is a complete IT infrastructure solution that allows you to monitor infrastructure, applications, logs, traces, and security events all in one place.
It support all kind of integration and you can if if you face any issue customer support is outstanding.
Dashboards & Visualizations makes easy to diagnose the issue. Configuration and implementation is easy supports all kind of OS, docker, K8s.
Smart alerts with machine learning-based anomaly detection help catch issues before they escalate. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
While Datadog is powerful and feature-rich, it can take some time to fully learn and configure for new users. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

plan_headings: See inside any stack, any app, at any scale, anywhere

datadog.trash_talk: We're more reliable than New Relic during incidents.

newrelic.name: New Relic

review_excerpts: The way we monitor our application and analyze performance issues has improved enormously since introducing New Relic, as we get new insights that were hidden from us previously. Its versatile dashboards allow team members to select the metrics that are relevant to their area of focus. Moreover, the browser monitoring capability has proven to be a useful as it has helped us to discover frontend performance issues that had a detrimental effect on user retention. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

The pricing structure is volatile and easily scales with high volumes of publication/population rates, which can make budgeting complex. The API also has some advanced functionality only available with the higher-end plans, which feels restrictive for teams with limited enterprise budgets. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

New Relic has addressed the issue of monitoring silos by bringing together our application, infrastructure and user experience monitoring in one place. This has allowed our team to diagnose incidents quicker, which in turn means that we can fix problems quicker, providing our users with a better product. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

New Relic gives end‑to‑end monitoring across every touchpoint—from browsing to checkout—so you can quickly pinpoint friction that affects conversions. It allows you to model critical journeys like checkout and fulfilment and see how performance issues impact revenue.
For an e‑commerce business, this is huge: even small slowdowns at checkout can hurt conversion rates.

honeycomb.name: Honeycomb

review_excerpts: Honeycomb is purpose-built for high-cardinality observability. Nothing else comes close for distributed tracing.
BubbleUp query interface is genuinely innovative. Find anomalies in minutes that would take hours in Datadog.
Events-based pricing is predictable — much easier to budget for serverless and container workloads.
Smaller vendor with passionate support team. Response times are excellent.
Limited ecosystem vs Datadog. Some integrations require custom instrumentation.
g2._note: G2 live scrape blocked; rating from mock research

grafana.name: Grafana Cloud

review_excerpts: Open-source roots mean deep customization. Dashboard community plugin library is huge.
No proprietary agent lock-in. We can switch backends without changing instrumentation.
Best price-to-value ratio in the category for metrics.
Grafana Cloud is simpler to run than self-hosted. Managed Loki and Tempo save real ops time.
Alerting still feels like an afterthought vs Datadog.

splunk.name: Splunk

review_excerpts: This profile is currently managed by Splunk Enterprise but has limited features. Are you part of the Splunk Enterprise team? Upgrade your plan to enhance your branding and engage with visitors to your profile!

Find out what is happening in your business and take meaningful action quickly with Splunk Enterprise. Automate the collection, indexing and alerting of machine data that's critical to your operations. Uncover the actionable insights from all your data — no matter the source or format. Leverage artificial intelligence and machine learning for predictive and proactive business decisions.

What I like most about Splunk Enterprise is its powerful search capabilities using SPL, which make it easy to analyze large volumes of log data quickly. It’s very useful for monitoring systems, identifying issues, and building dashboards for real-time insights. The flexibility in creating custom queries and visualizations is a big advantage Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
One of the main drawbacks is the cost, especially as data ingestion increases. Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.

Splunk Enterprise helps solve the problem of dealing with large volumes of log data coming from different systems. Without it, troubleshooting and monitoring can be time-consuming because the data is scattered. With Splunk, it becomes easier to centralize logs, search through them quickly, and identify issues in real time. This helps reduce debugging time and improves overall system monitoring Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
